metadata.description: Two guardrails for Claude Code: EnvShield (blocks secret reads + env exfiltration) and NoNuke (blocks destructive commands).

plugins.name: envshield
plugins.description: Stops Claude Code from reading .env files, SSH keys, AWS credentials, and other secret material — and blocks bash workarounds like printenv or docker compose config that would leak them via stdout. Writes a JSON audit log of every block.

plugins.name: nonuke
plugins.description: Blocks ~60 destructive command patterns (rm -rf, prisma migrate reset, DROP TABLE, git push --force, terraform destroy, kubectl delete, …) unless Claude explicitly confirms with the user. Writes an audit log.
